title: ConditionBasedFilter
description: ConditionBasedFilter: Basic object defining a condition-based 'filter from' workflow.

Condition.description: Filtering condition to be met for objects to be returned. ICondition: Top level interface for conditions: lightweight objects describing a yes/no question to be asked against another object.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
